query: SELECT shelf_code, shelf_level, COUNT(*) as items, SUM(facing_count) as total_facings, MAX(facing_count) as max_facing FROM shelf_data WHERE shelf_code = '食品1' AND session_id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM upload_sessions) GROUP BY shelf_code, shelf_level ORDER BY shelf_level;
